message: deps: update lru requirement from 0.16.3 to 0.17.0 (mines #62)

files.patch:
@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@ unicode-segmentation = "1.12.0"
 unicode-width = "0.2.2"
 smallvec = "1.15.1"
 tracing = "0.1.41"
-lru = "0.16.3"
+lru = "0.17.0"
 rustc-hash = "2.1.1"
 ropey = "1.6.1"
 unicode-bidi = { version = "0.3.18", optional = true }
